title: Unidentified Fluid Other Gaylien De Mars
description: SHOWTIMES: Doors 7:30pm - Show 8pm Exploring the feminine and masculine in a binary world to find the answer to the ultimate question: ‘Who am I?’ Unidentified Fluid Other is a ‘one-alien’ multi-media performance art piece with out-of-this-world live vocals by one of Brighton’s top vocalists and Titans Season 1 winner, Gaylien de Mars. An alien who can transform at will into anyone, Gaylien takes on many faces to better understand the human experience. In Unidentified Fluid Other, Gaylien reflects on their experiences moving through this often overwhelming world, trying to find belonging and identity. This show holds a mirror to the human spirit through music and stunning projections. Exploring themes of human behaviour, addiction, self-discovery, gender, infertility, misogyny, and feminism. Gaylien de Mars is a versatile drag artist and performer, with incredible vocals, thought-provoking concepts, and clever stage design. LGBTQIA+. Neurodiverse AuDHD.
content_warnings: This show is for mature audiences, including themes of transphobia, homophobia, infertility, misogyny, depictions of drowning, depictions of alcohol and marijuana abuse, and instances of flashing text
